positive: A whimsical, stylized, black and white silhouette of a majestic soaring fox among subtle abstract floral and mountainous elements. The fox is the central focus, depicted mid-leap with flowing tail and dramatic posture. The design should have clean lines, high contrast, and negative space utilized effectively for print clarity. Composition is circular and centered, suitable for repeat pattern or apparel art. Use ink wash style with defined edges, graphic novel quality, highly detailed, maximal contrast, vintage tattoo aesthetic, high resolution, vector art inspiration.
